name: Hot Spicy Bean Curd
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Cornstarch dissolved in 1 tablespoon water
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok and fry the onion, garlic, and chili for 30 seconds.
2. Add the salted beans and bean curd; gently stir-fry until the bean curd turns golden.
3. Incorporate the remaining ingredients and cook until the sauce thickens.
4. Serve hot over noodles or fried rice.
Jack Santa Maria, "Chinese Vegetarian Cookery"
